input: Run ideate plugin on this project
expected_behavior: Skill activates and produces the expected ideate plugin output following the defined process
Skill recognizes the trigger phrase and executes the ideate plugin workflow

input: Apply ideate plugin to analyze the current codebase with detailed output
expected_behavior: Skill produces comprehensive ideate plugin analysis with evidence-tagged findings
Skill activates with minimal input, applies reasonable defaults

input: What is the weather forecast for tomorrow?
expected_behavior: Skill should NOT activate — this input has no relation to ideate plugin

input: Run ideate plugin but I have no files or documentation yet
